name: benchmarked-free-ride
description: Auto-configure best free AI models based on benchmarked quality scores from daily CI runs
author: Sequrity

commands.auto: Auto-configure best free model with fallbacks
commands.auto -f: Add fallbacks while keeping current primary model
commands.list: View available free models ranked by benchmark score
commands.list --secure: List models ranked by security rating
commands.switch <model_id>: Switch to a specific model by ID
commands.fallbacks --secure: Update fallbacks prioritized by security rating

github_pages.description: Fetches benchmark results from public GitHub Pages API

post_install: Run 'benchmarked-free-ride leaderboard' to see available models
Run 'benchmarked-free-ride auto' to configure the best model
